# Coretex AI

> Coretex AI is an AI-powered adaptive learning companion that personalizes how students study, remember, and master every subject.

Coretex AI combines a conversational AI tutor, auto-generated quizzes and lessons, spaced-repetition flashcards, and real-time multiplayer study rooms to help learners progress at their own pace.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Coretex AI's AI learning companion, features, and how it works.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create a free account or sign in to start learning.
